message:
feat(core): wire unified query contract into MCP wa.search tool

mcp.rs (+140 lines modified):
- Replace inline SearchParams validation with
  \`parse_unified_search_query()\` from the query_contract module,
  giving MCP clients identical validation, defaults, and error
  reporting as CLI and robot mode
- Add \`until\` (upper-bound epoch ms) and \`mode\` (lexical/semantic/
  hybrid enum) parameters to the wa.search JSON schema
- Replace inline SearchOptions construction with
  \`to_storage_search_options(&canonical)\` for single-source-of-truth
  option mapping
- Add \`ensure_mode_supported()\` gate returning MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
  for semantic/hybrid modes until MCP-side support is complete
- Add \`until_filter\` and \`mode\` fields to McpSearchData response
- Update TOON roundtrip property tests: route through
  \`json_stringify_lines\` before re-parsing to handle encoding
  differences between TOON and JSON value representations
- Add \`wa_search_schema_includes_unified_contract_fields\` test
  verifying all contract fields (query, limit, pane, since, until,
  snippets, mode) are present in the tool definition schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
